_note: All names, IDs, addresses, dates and data in this file are synthetic and fictional. Use them to drive your agent via per-call dynamic variables. Never use real customer data.

cases.symptom: We sent a registration and were given this MaLo, but it bounces with 'Marktlokation nimmt nicht teil'. The automation cannot tell us why.
cases.goal: Find out the real reason and the next step. (Expected: the meter was a Baustromzähler, removed on 18.05, so a new Anlage is needed and we go back to the customer. No ticket number required.)

cases.statustext: APERAK am 03.06.2026 erhalten, aber keine Anmeldebestätigung; Frist verstrichen.
cases.symptom: We sent a registration, got the automated receipt, but never the confirmation, and the deadline has passed. Is it lost? Is it stuck?
cases.goal: Confirm the registration was received and is in process, learn why it stalled, get a Vorgangsnummer, and confirm no resubmission is needed.

cases.statustext: Identifikation lieferte keine passende/eindeutige MaLo für die Adresse.
cases.symptom: The MaLo we hold doesn't match the address. The building has several delivery points, so the address alone is ambiguous.
cases.goal: Get the correct MaLo. (The customer's Zählernummer disambiguates it.) Read the corrected MaLo back digit by digit before closing.
